metadata.title: obsidian-activity-history
metadata.description: Track activity of specified projects, Github like activity board

regex.source: .setText(`Specified project ${source} is not a tracked project.`)
.setDesc('Add project to tracking list. e.g. write `Project 1` to track the project located in `/Project 1`')
regex.target: .setDesc('添加项目到跟踪列表. 例如 写`Project 1`来跟踪位于`/Project 1`的项目')

regex.source: .setDesc('Remove project from the tracking list. e.g. `Project 1`')
regex.target: .setDesc('从跟踪列表中删除项目. 例如 `Project 1`')

regex.source: .setDesc('Color for lowest activity. Placeholder shows current color.')
regex.target: .setDesc('活跃度最低的颜色. 占位符显示当前颜色.')

regex.source: .setDesc('Color for low activity. Placeholder shows current color.')
regex.target: .setDesc('活跃度次低的颜色. 占位符显示当前颜色.')

regex.source: .setDesc('Color for medium activity. Placeholder shows current color.')
regex.target: .setDesc('活跃度中等的颜色. 占位符显示当前颜色.')

regex.source: .setDesc('Color for highest activity. Placeholder shows current color.')
regex.target: .setDesc('活跃度最高的颜色. 占位符显示当前颜色..')
.setDesc('文本颜色. 占位符显示当前颜色.')
.setDesc('空单元格颜色. 占位符显示当前颜色.')

regex.source: .setDesc('Cell Radius. integer, default is 1 = square, the higher the more round.')
regex.target: .setDesc('单元格半径. 整数, 默认是 1 = 方形, 数字越大越圆.')
